name: Map Quest
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on Mapquest with Synup
detailed_paragraph:
MapQuest + Synup

‍

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on MapQuest with Synup's listings & review management tools

What is MapQuest?

MapQuest, one of the pioneers of online mapping services, has been an invaluable tool for route planning and real-time navigation, touching millions of lives daily. Whether you are finding your way across town or planning a cross-country adventure, MapQuest offers unparalleled tools for getting you exactly where you need to be.

Why MapQuest + Synup?

  1. Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on MapQuest, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  2. Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to MapQuest through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  3. Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on MapQuest
  4. Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on Mapquest fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate MapQuest + Synup?

The MapQuest integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the MapQuest integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section
  3. Click on the MapQuest logo to manage the Synup + MapQuest integration and associated settings.
